name: uv_pipeline_smoke
description: Smoke test the UV ops chain: build a sphere, project box UVs, get layout stats, transfer to a low-poly sphere, sample a vmap across UVs. Catches regressions in any of the 6 UV tools.

args.script:
import c4d
from c4d import utils
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
for n in ['UvSphereSrc', 'UvSphereDst']:
    o = doc.SearchObject(n)
    if o: o.Remove()
for name, sub in [('UvSphereSrc', 24), ('UvSphereDst', 12)]:
    sg = c4d.BaseObject(c4d.Osphere)
    sg[c4d.PRIM_SPHERE_RAD] = 100
    sg[c4d.PRIM_SPHERE_SUB] = sub
    doc.InsertObject(sg)
    res = utils.SendModelingCommand(c4d.MCOMMAND_MAKEEDITABLE, [sg], doc=doc)
    p = res[0]
    p.SetName(name)
    doc.InsertObject(p)
c4d.EventAdd()
print('built UvSphereSrc + UvSphereDst')

import c4d
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
for n in ['UvSphereSrc', 'UvSphereDst']:
    o = doc.SearchObject(n)
    if o: o.Remove()
c4d.EventAdd()
print('teardown ok')
